vaultResetDescription: This will permanently delete all vault data for {name}. This action cannot be undone.
vaultResetRateLimited: Too many reset requests. Please try again later.
clearLockoutDescription: This resets {name}'s failed unlock attempt counter and immediately unlocks their account.
clearLockoutRateLimited: Too many clear-lockout requests. Please try again later.
revokeConflict: This reset has already been processed or revoked.
approveDialogBody: Approve vault reset for {targetEmail}? This action authorizes another admin's request to delete the user's vault.
approveDisabledTooltip: You initiated this reset; another admin must approve
approveConflict: This reset can no longer be approved.
maxConcurrentSessionsHelp: Maximum number of simultaneous sessions per user. When a user exceeds this limit, the oldest session is automatically terminated. Range: {min}–{max}.
concurrentSessionsUnlimited: No limit on concurrent sessions per user
idleTimeoutHelp: Sign out users after this many minutes of inactivity. Range: {min}–{max} minutes.
absoluteTimeoutHelp: Absolute session lifetime from sign-in, regardless of activity. Range: {min}–{max} minutes.
extensionIdleHelp: Client app access token is revoked after this many minutes without use. Range: {min}–{max} minutes. Values near the minimum may be unreliable for browser extensions due to Chrome service-worker dormancy.
extensionAbsoluteHelp: Client app token family is revoked after this many minutes from first issue. Range: {min}–{max} minutes.
vaultAutoLockEnabled: Automatically lock the vault after inactivity
vaultAutoLockHelp: Automatically lock the vault after this many minutes of inactivity; re-entry of the master passphrase is required to unlock. Must be between {min} and {max} minutes AND not longer than the web session idle timeout or the client app idle timeout above (locking the vault later than the session/token expires leaves cached data decrypted past sign-out).
vaultAutoLockExceedsIdleCap: Vault auto-lock must be {n} minutes or less (same as the shorter of the web session / client app idle timeouts above).
accessRestrictionDescription: Restrict access to this tenant by IP address or Tailscale network. When configured, only matching connections are allowed (OR logic).
allowedCidrsHelp: Enter one CIDR per line (e.g. 192.168.1.0/24). Maximum {max} entries. Leave empty to allow all IPs.
tailscaleEnabled: Restrict access to the Tailscale network
tailscaleEnabledHelp: When enabled, browser access is allowed from any source in the Tailscale network address range; the tailnet name below is verified only for API/token access. For strict tenant isolation, combine this with Allowed IP Ranges.
tailscaleTailnetHelp: The tailnet name to verify for API/token connections (e.g. "example" for hostname.example.ts.net).
tailscaleTailnetRequired: Tailnet name is required when Tailscale restriction is enabled.
selfLockoutWarning: Your current IP would be blocked by this policy. Are you sure you want to proceed?
scimManagedRoleError: Cannot change role of SCIM-managed member.
transferOwnershipDesc: Transfer ownership to another member. Your role will be changed to Admin.
requirePasskeyHelp: When enabled, all users must enroll a passkey to sign in. A grace period allows existing users time to comply.
passkeyGracePeriodHelp: Number of days existing users have to enroll a passkey before access is restricted. Leave empty for no grace period.
requireMinPinLengthHelp: Minimum number of characters required for passkey PINs ({min}–{max}). Leave empty for no minimum.
passkeyGracePeriodValidationMin: Grace period must be at least {min} day.
passkeyGracePeriodValidationMax: Grace period must be {max} days or less.
passkeyMinPinLengthValidationMin: Minimum PIN length must be at least {min}.
passkeyMinPinLengthValidationMax: Minimum PIN length must be {max} or less.
lockoutPolicyDescription: Configure tiered lockout thresholds and durations.
lockoutThresholdHelp: Number of consecutive failed login attempts that triggers this lockout tier ({min}–{max}). Leave empty to disable this tier.
lockoutDurationHelp: How long the account is locked after reaching the threshold ({min}–{max} minutes = 1 week). Leave empty to disable this tier.
lockoutDurationRange: Duration must be between {min} and {max} minutes.
lockoutThresholdAscending: Thresholds must be in ascending order across tiers.
lockoutDurationAscending: Durations must be in ascending order across tiers.
passwordPolicyDescription: Configure password strength and expiry requirements.
tenantMinPasswordLengthHelp: Minimum number of characters required for user passwords ({min}–{max}). Set to 0 to disable.
passwordMaxAgeEnabledHelp: When enabled, users will be prompted to change their password after the specified number of days.
passwordMaxAgeDaysHelp: Number of days before a password expires ({min}–{max}). Users will be notified before expiry.
passwordMaxAgeRequired: Password max age is required when expiry is enabled.
passwordExpiryWarningDaysHelp: Number of days before expiry to start showing warnings ({min}–{max}). Leave empty for no warning.
passwordExpiryWarningValidationMin: Warning period must be at least {min} day.
passwordExpiryWarningValidationMax: Warning period must be {max} days or less.
retentionPolicyDescription: Configure retention periods for vault data and logs.
trashRetentionEnabled: Limit how long trashed entries are kept
trashRetentionEnabledHelp: When enabled, trashed entries older than the specified number of days are permanently deleted. When disabled, trashed entries are kept indefinitely.
trashRetentionDaysHelp: Number of days to keep trashed entries ({min}–{max}). Entries older than this are permanently deleted.
trashRetentionRequired: Retention period is required when retention limit is enabled.
trashRetentionValidationMin: Retention period must be at least {min} days.
trashRetentionValidationMax: Retention period must be {max} days or less.
historyRetentionEnabled: Limit how long password history is kept
historyRetentionEnabledHelp: When enabled, password history entries older than the specified number of days are deleted. When disabled, history is kept indefinitely.
historyRetentionDaysHelp: Number of days to keep password history ({min}–{max}). History older than this is deleted.
historyRetentionRequired: Retention period is required when retention limit is enabled.
historyRetentionValidationMin: Retention period must be at least {min} days.
historyRetentionValidationMax: Retention period must be {max} days or less.
shareAccessLogRetentionEnabled: Limit how long share access logs are kept
shareAccessLogRetentionEnabledHelp: When enabled, share-link access logs older than the specified number of days are deleted. When disabled, access logs are kept indefinitely.
shareAccessLogRetentionDaysHelp: Number of days to keep share access logs ({min}–{max}). Logs older than this are deleted.
shareAccessLogRetentionRequired: Retention period is required when retention limit is enabled.
shareAccessLogRetentionValidationMin: Retention period must be at least {min} days.
shareAccessLogRetentionValidationMax: Retention period must be {max} days or less.
directorySyncLogRetentionEnabled: Limit how long directory sync logs are kept
directorySyncLogRetentionEnabledHelp: When enabled, directory sync logs older than the specified number of days are deleted. When disabled, sync logs are kept indefinitely.
directorySyncLogRetentionDaysHelp: Number of days to keep directory sync logs ({min}–{max}). Logs older than this are deleted.
directorySyncLogRetentionRequired: Retention period is required when retention limit is enabled.
directorySyncLogRetentionValidationMin: Retention period must be at least {min} days.
directorySyncLogRetentionValidationMax: Retention period must be {max} days or less.
notificationRetentionEnabled: Limit how long notifications are kept
notificationRetentionEnabledHelp: When enabled, notifications older than the specified number of days are deleted. When disabled, notifications are kept indefinitely.
notificationRetentionDaysHelp: Number of days to keep notifications ({min}–{max}). Notifications older than this are deleted.
notificationRetentionRequired: Retention period is required when retention limit is enabled.
notificationRetentionValidationMin: Retention period must be at least {min} days.
notificationRetentionValidationMax: Retention period must be {max} days or less.
auditLogRetentionEnabled: Limit the retention period for audit logs
auditLogRetentionEnabledHelp: When enabled, audit logs older than the specified number of days will be automatically purged.
auditLogRetentionDaysHelp: Number of days to retain audit logs ({min}–{max}). Logs older than this will be deleted automatically.
auditLogRetentionRequired: Retention period is required when retention limit is enabled.
auditLogRetentionValidationMin: Retention period must be at least {min} days.
auditLogRetentionValidationMax: Retention period must be {max} days or less.
tokenPolicyDescription: Configure expiry limits for service account (SA) tokens and Just-In-Time (JIT) access tokens.
saTokenMaxExpiryEnabledHelp: When enabled, service account tokens cannot be created with an expiry beyond the specified number of days.
saTokenMaxExpiryDaysHelp: Maximum allowed token lifetime in days ({min}–{max}).
saTokenMaxExpiryRequired: Maximum expiry days is required when SA token expiry limit is enabled.
saTokenMaxExpiryValidationMin: Maximum expiry must be at least {min} day.
saTokenMaxExpiryValidationMax: Maximum expiry must be {max} days or less.
jitTokenDefaultEnabledHelp: When enabled, JIT access tokens are issued with this default lifetime unless the requester specifies otherwise.
jitTokenDefaultTtlSecHelp: Default JIT token lifetime in seconds ({min}–{max}).
jitTokenDefaultRequired: Default TTL is required when JIT token default is enabled.
jitTokenMaxEnabledHelp: When enabled, JIT access tokens cannot be issued with a lifetime exceeding this value.
jitTokenMaxTtlSecHelp: Maximum JIT token lifetime in seconds ({min}–{max}).
jitTokenMaxRequired: Maximum TTL is required when JIT token max is enabled.
jitTokenTtlValidationMin: TTL must be at least {min} seconds.
jitTokenTtlValidationMax: TTL must be {max} seconds or less.
jitTokenDefaultExceedsMax: Default TTL must not exceed the maximum TTL.
delegationPolicyDescription: Configure TTL limits for vault delegation sessions used by CLI agents.
delegationDefaultEnabledHelp: When enabled, delegation sessions are created with this default lifetime.
delegationDefaultTtlSecHelp: Default delegation session lifetime in seconds ({min}–{max}).
delegationDefaultRequired: Default TTL is required when delegation default is enabled.
delegationMaxEnabledHelp: When enabled, delegation sessions cannot be created with a lifetime exceeding this value.
delegationMaxTtlSecHelp: Maximum delegation session lifetime in seconds ({min}–{max}).
delegationMaxRequired: Maximum TTL is required when delegation max is enabled.
delegationTtlValidationMin: TTL must be at least {min} seconds.
delegationTtlValidationMax: TTL must be {max} seconds or less.
delegationDefaultExceedsMax: Default TTL must not exceed the maximum TTL.
